title: Professional Summary
content: Nishanth Manoharan is a Data Analytics Engineering graduate student at Northeastern University and a recruiter-facing candidate with experience across generative AI, data engineering, analytics, and machine learning. His work spans retrieval evaluation, RAG systems, data pipelines, forecasting, dashboarding, and applied NLP.

title: Northeastern University
content: Master of Science in Data Analytics Engineering at Northeastern University in Boston, Massachusetts, with expected graduation in December 2026.

title: SRM Institute of Science and Technology
content: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science completed at SRM Institute of Science and Technology in Chennai, India, from June 2020 to June 2024.

title: Relevant Graduate Coursework
content: Relevant coursework includes Neural Networks and Deep Learning, Applied Natural Language Processing, and Data Mining in Engineering.

title: Certifications
content: Certifications include AWS Certified AI Practitioner and Databricks Certified Data Engineer Associate. A Generative AI Associate certification is listed as in progress on one resume variant.
